prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, bustling atmosphere. Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous senior cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim and silver hair, approaches Ari Oakspire, a masculine trader in a neat vest and guild sash. Mira confidently places a signed commission document onto Ari's wooden market counter. Ari looks up with a friendly, professional smile. Bright, polished anime RPG aesthetic, cinematic camera focus on the interaction, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ari Oakspire picks up the signed commission from the counter, cross-referencing it with his digital ledger tablet. He nods in approval and hands Mira a small pouch of guild resources. Mira accepts the pouch with a satisfied expression. Consistent identities, camera, and lighting, no text, no watermark.
